title: Persist token IDs into discovery cache for realtime market-stream mapping
objective: Preserve yes_token_id and no_token_id in runtime/last_discovery.json so tracked open-position assets can be mapped to Polymarket market-stream subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: yes_token_id and no_token_id appear in runtime/last_discovery.json after refresh
rollback: Revert the narrow serializer change in core/discovery.py.
